desc: Creates a Detail callout view that wraps a selected Room or Space with a configurable margin.
summary: Creates a Detail callout view that wraps a selected Room or Space with a configurable margin. Pure maths delegated to GetCalloutRectangle.
usecase: Detail callout around a semantic room or MEP space.
precondition: Active document open; parent view supports callouts; Room/Space id resolves; project has a Detail ViewFamilyType.
postcondition: One new callout view added, inside one committed Transaction, audit trail recorded.
logictree: 1) User or Bot supplies Resolver_ParentViewId (defaults to active view) + Resolver_RoomOrSpaceId + Resolver_MarginMm (default 600). 2) Resolve the element; if it is neither a Room nor a Space WireError + abort. 3) Resolve Detail ViewFamilyType id via ResolveDetailViewFamilyTypeId.FindFirstInDocument; if invalid WireError + abort. 4) Open Transaction 'Create callout (room/space wrap)'. 5) rect = GetCalloutRectangle.FromRoom(room, marginFt) OR FromSpace(space, marginFt). 6) callout = ViewSection.CreateCallout(doc, parentView.Id, vftId, rect.min, rect.max); commit. 7) Bot: JSON {ok, callout_view_id, parent_view_id, room_or_space_id, margin_mm}. User: toast 'Callout placed around {target.Name}.' 8) Any exception → tracker.Fail(ex); WireFault {parent_view_id, room_or_space_id, margin_mm}.
